summary: A white sedan traveling on a city street experiences a sudden rollover and crash, overturning onto its side.

events_timeline.event: A white sedan traveling on a city street experiences a sudden rollover and crash, overturning onto its side.

uncertainties: The identity of the driver remains unknown.
Precise cause of the rollover is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: The rollover of the white sedan constitutes a critical incident due to the abrupt nature of the crash and the potential for injury or fatalities.
